Title: User logs in successfully
Preconditions: User account exists and is active
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username "testuser".
3. Enter the password "password123".
4. Click the login button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User account exists but is inactive
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username "testuser".
3. Enter the password "wrongpassword".
4. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: User logs out
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click the logout button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the login page.

Title: User registers successfully
Preconditions: User does not have an existing account
Test Data: New username: "newuser", valid password: "password123", valid email: "newuser@example.com"
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username "newuser".
3. Enter the password "password123".
4. Enter the email "newuser@example.com".
5. Accept the privacy document.
6. Click the register button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: User tries to register with an existing username
Preconditions: User account with username "existinguser" exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the username "existinguser".
3. Enter the password "password123".
4. Enter the email "newuser@example.com".
5. Accept the privacy document.
6. Click the register button.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating the username is already taken.

Title: User views exchange proposals
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Exchange Proposals" option.
3. Check if there are any proposals listed.
Expected Result: List of exchange proposals is displayed.

Title: User views detailed proposal
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are proposals listed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Exchange Proposals" option.
3. Click on the proposal with ID 123.
4. Accept the proposal.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page with the updated proposal list.

Title: User reports berries and inserts a new entry
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Berries" option.
3. Click on the "Report Berries" button.
4. Enter the berry name "Blueberry".
5. Enter the quantity "10".
6. Click the "Insert" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page with a success message.

Title: User reports berries and deletes an entry
Preconditions: User is logged in and has previously reported berries
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Berries" option.
3. Click on the "Report Berries" button.
4. Click on the "Delete" button for the entry with berry name "Blueberry".
5. Confirm the deletion.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page with a success message.

Title: User views saved elements
Preconditions: User is logged in and has saved elements
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Saved Elements" option.
3. Check if there are any elements listed.
Expected Result: List of saved elements is displayed.

Title: User removes a saved element
Preconditions: User is logged in and has saved elements
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Saved Elements" option.
3. Click on the element with ID 123.
4. Click the "Remove" button.
5. Confirm the removal.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page with a success message.

Title: User views offers
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Offers" option.
3. Check if there are any offers listed.
Expected Result: List of offers is displayed.

Title: User applies filters to view offers
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are offers listed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Offers" option.
3. Apply the filter for category "Electronics".
4. Check if the filtered offers are displayed.
Expected Result: List of offers matching the filter criteria is displayed.

Title: User views and modifies personal information
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "View Profile" option.
3. Click on the "Modify Personal Info" button.
4. Enter the new email "newemail@example.com".
5. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page with a success message.

Title: User modifies personal information with invalid data
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "View Profile" option.
3. Click on the "Modify Personal Info" button.
4. Enter the invalid email "invalidemail".
5. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating invalid email format.

Title: User inserts a new item successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Item name: "New Item", description: "This is a new item."
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Insert New Item" button.
3. Provide an image (optional).
4. Enter the item name "New Item".
5. Enter the description "This is a new item."
6. Click the "Insert" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page with the new item added to the list.

Title: User inserts a new item without providing an image
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Item name: "New Item", description: "This is a new item."
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Insert New Item" button.
3. Skip providing an image.
4. Enter the item name "New Item".
5. Enter the description "This is a new item."
6. Click the "Insert" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page with the new item added to the list.

Title: User deletes an item successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items listed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Delete Item" button for the item with ID 123.
3. Confirm the deletion.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page with the item removed from the list.

Title: User cancels the deletion of an item
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items listed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Delete Item" button for the item with ID 123.
3. Cancel the deletion.
Expected Result: User remains on the current page with the item still listed.

Title: User explores offers
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Explore Offers" option.
3. Check if there are any offers listed.
Expected Result: List of offers is displayed.

Title: User proposes a new exchange
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Exchange item: "Old Phone", description: "This is an old phone."
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Propose New Exchange" button.
3. Enter the exchange item "Old Phone".
4. Enter the description "This is an old phone."
5. Click the "Propose" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page with the proposed exchange added to the list.

4. Click the "Accept" button.
5. Confirm the acceptance.

Title: User rejects an exchange proposal
Preconditions: User is logged in and has exchange proposals listed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Exchanges" option.
3. Click on the proposal with ID 123.
4. Click the "Reject" button.
5. Confirm the rejection.

Title: User filters offers successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in and has offers listed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Click on the "Offers" option.
3. Apply the filter for category "Electronics".
